name: Magic Chocolate Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate with milk and salt in a double boiler.
2. Stir constantly over boiling water until very thick.
3. Gradually stir in the water; keep smooth and continue cooking, stirring often until the mixture thickens.
4. Remove from heat. Stir in vanilla.
5. Pour into the shell.
6. Cool at room temperature for 1/2 hour.
7. Refrigerate at least 3 hours.
8. Garnish with whipped cream just before serving.
This is from a very old Eagle Brand cookbook. This is very rich and delicious!
